appliedUpdates.description: Worker was running old code (started at 05:57, fix committed at 06:25). Restarted worker to load latest unrestricted company scope fix (commit 2a0c722).

reValidationNotes.reason: Round 1 failed due to worker running old code without the unrestricted company scope fix. After restart with updated code, all three routing assertions pass.
